title: Ethiopian Lentil Azifa
description: A flavorful and nutritious Ethiopian-inspired dish made with lentils and azifa. Fluffy and aromatic, this recipe is perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, water, and Ethiopian spice blend. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Stir in the chopped azifa and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional azifa if desired.
